Your turn 1. Energy resets to 3. Attack cards damage the enemy; guard cards absorb the next enemy attack.

When the draw pile is empty, the discard pile refills it in fixed order.

Glass Warden

Enemy will strike for 6 after you end turn.

HP
32 / 32
NEXT ATTACK
6
Hand
Click a card to play it.

No cards in hand.

Ash Circuit

Defeat the Glass Warden with a deterministic starter deck. Each player turn starts with 3 energy and a five-card hand. Attack cards damage the enemy. Guard cards add block for the next enemy attack.

No rewards, upgrades, map, or run structure are included in this phase.

Start Combat
